response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff Software Engineer with strong technical leadership, mentoring, and software craftsmanship skills, he significantly lacks the critical minimum requirement of 8 years of C++ programming experience, possessing less than a year of professional C++ experience. Furthermore, his background is predominantly in full-stack web development (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) rather than the low-level cloud compute platform infrastructure required for this role.
strengths: Demonstrated technical leadership and mentoring experience, including Staff-level roles and organizing engineering workshops.
Strong background in software design, architecture, and establishing engineering best practices like TDD and CI/CD.
Proven ability to own and deliver complex projects, including founding an open-source Geo-Data platform deployed on Kubernetes.
concerns: Falls drastically short of the minimum 8 years of C++ programming experience required, with less than one year of professional C++ use.
Experience is primarily in full-stack web development and high-level microservices rather than deep cloud compute and hardware architecture.
Lacks extensive production-level cloud architecture experience specifically focused on core compute infrastructure.
